name: Kiwi Strawberry Splash
recipeIngredient: 1 carton Schwan's Apple Juice Concentrate, 8 oz
2 cartons Schwan's Kiwi Strawberry Tropical Teasers, 8 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Apple Juice Concentrate and Kiwi Strawberry Tropical Teasers with 4 quarts of cold water.
2. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
3. Add the ginger ale just before serving.
Makes 54 - 4oz servings or 36 - 6oz servings.
